entry.title: Re: How to restrict employees from recording timesheet af...
entry.content: Hi @Volker_Ruof, thanks again for the information. Will try it out and hope it works as expected.

entry.title: Assign equipment class automatically when creating serial number/ equipment
entry.content:
Dear all,

How to enable the assignment of the equipment class automatically for serial number/ equipment?
Now the equipment class have been assigned manually in IE02 for all serial numbers. As per our business process we create serial numbers within production order and it would be difficult to assign equipment class manual to every seril number if one of the production order has more than 50-100 pieces.
It would be very helpful if the equipment classes were automatically assigned when the equipment is created. As we find out that for batch classification it is possible to assign the batch class to the material master and then every batch that has been created with this material has automatically batch class gets assigned.

My questions:

  1. Is it possible to assign class automatically to the every serial number/ equipment? If yes, then how?
  2. Is there any other alternative to reduce the above manual work?

I look forward to your feedback and thank you in advance for your support.

Thanks in advance,
Suyog

entry.title: Re: SAP instance reached state SHUTDOWN after having stat...
entry.content:
Now getting below error from dev_w2 file. Please adivse 

 

B Thu Dec 12 18:05:21:538 2024 B dbsync[db_syexe]: wait=0, call_no=17, current_ts=20241212180521, last_counter=-2147483648 E E Thu Dec 12 18:06:21:546 2024 E Enqueue Info: enque/use_pfclock2 = FALSE E Profile-Parameter: enque/sync_dequeall = 0 B B Thu Dec 12 18:07:21:539 2024 B dbsync[db_syexe]: wait=0, call_no=18, current_ts=20241212180721, last_counter=-2147483648

entry.title: SAP Connect
entry.content:
Participate in our brand-new yearly event to enhance your knowledge in SAP technologies, discover novel innovations, and understand how solutions within SAP's integrated suite collaborate to achieve improved business results.

Find more information here.

entry.title: input field editable when check box is ticked.
entry.content:
Hi All,

In CJ20n Project Builder, when i click the check box value from user status, i want a WBS field editable. 

It is standard program, so i have to do enhancement, 

Can you guide me where we exactly do enhancement? in PBO or PAI of the WBS field screen?

if so, please suggest me after what logic we can add the new peace of code which can help us to make field editable(it also needed that if user edit the WBS number that value need to update related database table, )

Note. Project is ALE distributed So is it cause any issue if user change WBS number after releasing the project?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: have you ever redefined one? it gives you option to take over the url when you do the "redefine""

entry.title: Key Links & Notes for SAP Forecasting and Replenishment at Your Fingertips!
entry.content:
Dear SAP F&R community,

in this blog I would like to highlight some important links and notes for SAP Forecasting and Replenishment and the add-on for Fresh.  Most of them are not new,  but it might be helpful to have them handy! If I forgot one of your favorites, please let me know!

General information

  • Online Help: SAP F&R 5.2   SAP F&R, add-on for fresh products
  • SAP F&R  and Fresh maintenance options, details see
    • SAP’s maintenance strategy  Note 1648480   
      SAP F&R Note 2240592
    • Maintenance Phases
    • Product Availability Matrix SAP F&R
    • Product Availability Matrix Fresh
  • Schedules for SAP Support Package Stack 
  • Sizing: helps you find sizing estimations for SAP F&R 5.2 (including update for SAP HANA and Fresh Add-on)
  • Training: Check out the SAP Retail Learning journey that includes SAP F&R
  • Check every quarter for smaller and bigger improvements in note  2335048 this new collective note '’F&R improvements and recommendations'  which will be updated on a regular basis
    Latest improvements in more detail see also this blog

Useful single notes

  • SAP F&R Configuration Guide: Note 2393815
  • Note 1588213 - Implementation recommendations for SAP F&R 5.2 on SCM 7.02 and 7.14 
  • SAP F&R powered by UDF (Unified Demand Forecast) – something to consider in your SAP F&R implementation because it delivery great value!
    • Check out note 2367172 that contains a detailed integration guide
      SAP Customer Activity Repository Online Help including UDF
    • Also around UDF: Note 3484728  contains a link to a CARAB Wiki  page about - DDF/PMR/UDF
  • Connectivity: Mapping Documentation for SAP ERP 6.0 EhP 6 for Retail / SAP F&R 5.2: Note 1658548  contains information for the data transformation and transmission between SAP ERP 6.0 EhP 6 for Retail and SAP F&R 5.2
  • Connectivity: SAP F&R 5.2 / API Documentation : Read note 1657947  if you want to use SAP F&R integrated with any other ERP than SAP Retail
  • Connectivity: Check reports operation guide:  Note 1387699 documents how the check reports work and how they have to be operated.  
  • 1433834 F&R Scheduling: technical documentation
  • 2955294 F&R Processor Administration Settings - technical documentation
  • 1361833 Significance of time series types in SAP F&R - tech. documentation

entry.title: Asset Class (4001 Inv. Measure Tang) does not allowing line items to Settle AUC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are managing AUC with Investment project using Asset class 4001 which does not have check mark for Line item Settlement in the Asset Class and the Standard Asset Class 4001 is assigned to the investment profile 00001

Created Project in App : Project Control - Enterprise Projects, 

System Generated AUC Asset Code Automatically

But when i am creating the Settlement Rule for the Same AUC Asset Code System is Showing the Below Error.

Asset is investment measure, transaction type is not allowed. message no. AK005

Could you please advice on how to settle line items to an AUC using a investment measure profile.

If this is not feasible could you suggest an alternative method for settling the line items to AUC Asset.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: DO NOT Install BusinessObjects BI 4.3 SP04 or 4.3 SP04 Patch 1
entry.content:
@adende Please check firewall settings about the BODS server's CMS (CentralManagementServer) "Request Port".

You can  use (on client) telnet host port (or telnet host:port on Unix systems) to see if the connection is refused, accepted, or timeouts.

entry.title: A/p Down Payment Pending Invoice
entry.content:
Hi

  I want simple Addon through which when A/p invoice is created and there are pending A/p Down Payment Advices for that customer then a message should be displayed.

Thanks

entry.title: Delete Primary Values from Numeric Point Chart
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in my story i have a numeric point chart with three primary values. With a button click i want to remove the three values and add two other ones.

does anybody know how i have to wright the script, that this will work?

unfortunately, everything i tried does not work.

thanks a lot.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning BPC live model - Publish data from the s...
entry.content:
Hi Rubén,

Can you try the following code instead of yours? This might help you.

if(BPC_PlanningSequence.execute().status === BpcPlanningSequenceExecutionResponseStatus.Success);

{var bpcVersion = Table_1.getPlanning().getPublicVersion("All Versions");
if (bpcVersion) {
if(bpcVersion.isDirty()) {
bpcVersion.publish();
};
};}

Best regards,

Tuncay.

entry.title: Hi there, I have a challenge while integrating SAP JCo (3.1.10) into a Maven. Naming not allowed
entry.content:
My issue is integrating SAP JCo (version 3.1.10) into a Maven-based Java project, specifically for creating a custom NiFi processor.

Despite attempts to use Maven's maven-dependency-plugin with configurations like stripVersion or destFileName to rename the jar back to sapjco3.jar during the build process, the issue persists. This causes the following runtime error:

java.lang.ExceptionInInitializerError: Illegal JCo archive "sapjco3-3.1.10.jar". It is not allowed to rename or repackage the original archive "sapjco3.jar".
QUESTIONS:
1. Maven Integration: Is there an officially recommended approach to integrate SAP JCo into Maven projects while following SAP's archive naming restrictions?
2. Runtime Compliance: Are there specific runtime configurations, environment variables, or Java options that could help resolve this issue?
3. Artifact Packaging: How should the sapjco3.jar be handled in scenarios where it needs to be included as part of a deployable archive (e.g., NiFi’s NAR format)?
4. Future Enhancements: Given the challenges of using JCo with Maven, are there any plans for SAP to release Maven-compatible artifacts or documentation addressing these issues?

entry.title: SAP TechEd
entry.content:
Join to get updates for SAP TechEd in Berlin and Virtual!

Simply complete and submit the form and we will be in touch once SAP TechEd plans for the 2025 season have been finalized and registration opens.

Thank you for your interest in the SAP TechEd Program.

entry.title: Load SAPUI5 library from Cordova container
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're currently deploying a Fiori standalone app to the BTP Cloud Foundry with an approuter to enable a static URL for our application. Due to performance issues when running on mobile devices with low bandwidth, we figured we could create a Cordova app that uses its in-app browser to open the web app and load only the SAPUI5 library files from local device storage.

We referenced sap-ui-core.js like so:

 

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
	src="https://localhost/sapui5/sap-ui-core.js"
	data-sap-ui-theme="sap_belize_plus"
	data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{"com.example.app": "./"}'
	data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
	data-sap-ui-oninit="module:sap/ui/core/ComponentSupport"
	data-sap-ui-async="true"
	data-sap-ui-frameOptions="trusted">
</script>

 

Unfortunately, some files are not being loaded due to issues with CORS. Strangely enough, only some files like messagebundle.properties or sap/ui/thirdparty/datajs.js are affected. sap-ui-core.js and most other files are loaded successfully.

What are we missing?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: The 2H 2024 Release of SAP SuccessFactors Learning – Key Highlights
entry.content:
We are also experiencing a long lag with items and classes appearing for employees to search in the new learning experience.  I found an enhancement request for this however this is very problematic when creating classes.  Does anyone have a workaround for this? 

Here is the enhancement link, please vote for this: Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence (sap.com)

entry.title: Re: gs_usbapilink-bapilink is initial: what does it mean?
entry.content: Thanks Erol

entry.title: Re: Custom Fields and Logics - Create and Capturing the Changes into Transport Request
entry.content: Thank you for the wonderful blog.

entry.title: Re: input field editable when check box is ticked.
entry.content:
Is this field a standard field, is it already input allowed by standard.

  • Check also OPUJ, OPUK / SPRO for WBS modifiable fields, Field Selection for Work Breakdown Structures
  • Look at form MODULE modif_pbo of function group (there should be an ENHANCEMENT-POINT available)
  • You could read status from memory buffer with FM such as STATUS_READ or STATUS_CHANGES_GET

entry.title: Re: Service entry sheet deleted but not in PO history
entry.content: Correction done, thanks for the help. The application of the reports that was in that note, solved the problem.

entry.title: Re: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content:
@Sandra.rossi, thank you for your response.

Here is a sample code snippet from what I want:

DATA:
lo_writer TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_writer_2007,
lo_reader TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_reader_2007,
lo_excel TYPE REF TO zcl_excel,
lo_worksheet TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_worksheet,
lo_columns TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_columns,
lo_column TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_column,
lo_style TYPE REF TO zcl_excel_style,
sheet_id TYPE i.

" Instantiates Excel reader object.
CREATE OBJECT lo_reader TYPE /orbit/cl_x_reader_2007.

" Loads data from provided xstring in /ALLEVO/CL_N_EXCEL format
lo_excel = lo_reader->/orbit/if_x_reader~load( excel_data ).

lo_worksheet = lo_excel->get_worksheet_by_index( iv_index = 1 ).

lo_worksheet->set_table(
ip_table = it_data
ip_table_title = mv_tablename
ip_top_left_column = min_col
ip_top_left_row = row ).

" Save the changes to the Excel file
lo_excel->save

  • Is it possible now to extend the tables of the existing workbook?

entry.title: Re: invisible Import settings for public dimension SAP SAC
entry.content: Thanks for reply. understood but , whenever changing dimension structure , do we need to create transformations from scratch again ?

entry.title: Subcontracting scenario using ME2O
entry.content:
Hello Guys, hope you´re all doing fine.

I have a scenario of subcontrating, where whe create the delivery to the supplier in ME2O.

My material price, is controlled by Moving Average Price. And when i create some deliverys, the value of the material that i bought, is not the same of the delivery. 

Because i buy this material, and i do not receive in my deposit, is sent direct to my supplier of subcontracting.

Question, exist the possibility of changing the pricing of the delivery in ME2O, to standard cost, but only of the delivery ? Not changing the price of the material to Standard.

If there is, how can i change the pricing of ME2O.

Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances - Italy
entry.content:
Hi Kamil,

Now I copied the Help Portal Documentation link again, since this is for Italy,

Schedule Post Closing and Opening Balances | SAP Help Portal

To ensure that the posting logic meets the legal requirements for Italy, make sure that you do the following:

  • In the app, you must use the variant SAP&ITALY (Standard Variant for Italy) or a modified copy of this variant.

  • In the scheduling app, instead of selecting a variant, you must select the country/region-specific job template Closing/Opening Postings at Year End (Italy).

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.title: Can anyone explain the use of user exit SC010 in substitution
entry.content:
HI Team 

can anyone explain why SC010 user exit is assigned in substitution rule and what is the use of it. In which tcode SC010 user exit substitution is performed?

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: FLP: How to Disable 'Search' in the Shell Bar for Specific Applications/Catalogs Only
entry.content:
Hi,

We are looking for a way to disable the search functionality in the shell bar of the Fiori Launchpad, but only for specific applications or catalogs.

So far we've managed to disable search globally via transaction /UI2/FLP_CUS_CONF by specifying SEARCH option as false

I also tried to disable it in a catalog via target mapping for application by using parameter "renderers/fiori2/componentData/config/enableSearch" as false, but this one did not work at all.

I was only able to disable it by creating a separate target mapping and specifying semantic object as Shell and action as bootConfig and adding the parameter that I had used before, but this worked on a global level again.

Our current SAP_UI version is 758.

 Is there a way to disable the search functionality in the FLP shell bar specifically for selected applications or catalogs, rather than globally?

Thanks in advance for your help!

entry.title: REFX Lease Liability Entry
entry.content:
Dear Team 

In REFX module for reduction in lease liability entries are getting posted in the system but against the expense GL , cost centre is not getting displayed. From configuration perspective need to know all the steps to get the cost center at the expense line item level.

Thanks

Viral Guruji

entry.title: Re: It has never been easier to print from SAP with Microsoft Universal Print
entry.content:
Hey @Martin-Frick, hope you are enjoying down under.

Microsoft Universal print as per our docs article uses the browser and OS functionalities for cloud printing from Fiori apps. What made you think otherwise? Do we need to update materials maybe?

KR Martin

entry.title: XML Namespace Error with XPATH condition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have below as the content which needs to be routed based on the field 'Message' value. 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
  <code>06/019</code>
  <message xml:lang="en">Document  does not exist</message>
  <innererror>
    <application>
      <component_id/>
      <service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
      <service_id>TEST</service_id>
      <service_version>0001</service_version>
    </application>
    <transactionid>d828d56baed54a718432432e7cd27533</transactionid>
    <timestamp/>
    <Error_Resolution>
      <SAP_Transaction/>
      <SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
    </Error_Resolution>
    <errordetails>
      <errordetail>
        <ContentID/>
        <code>06/033</code>
        <message>Document  does not exist</message>
        <propertyref/>
        <severity>error</severity>
        <target/>
        <transition>false</transition>
      </errordetail>
    </errordetails>
  </innererror>
</error>

 

Tried the condition = //innererror/errordetails/errordetail[contains(message, 'Document')]

Somehow, it is not working due to the namespace. I've also added the namespace in the runtime configuration as xmlns=http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata Still getting invalid namespace declared error. 

Appreciate your valuable inputs and support. 

Thanks,

Barath Vivekanandan

entry.title: Re: Output variables of added Action in a process don't m...
entry.content: I found the answer - some of the output variables were somehow generated without type. Since the output couldn't be changed after the fact in the action project I completley redid them and made sure to define a type and it now works.

entry.title: Re: General ledger distribution and assessment
entry.content:
Hi Dalao,

The tags on your questions are for SAP S/4HANA Cloud; however, in this case, the Tcode = App ID F3338 is the same for Private and Public.

You can check this information in the SAP Fiori Library: https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F3338')/S33

Best regards

Edna

entry.title: Re: Payment run; clearing journal entry
entry.content: Hi Ivangomez

entry.title: Re: Asset Class (4001 Inv. Measure Tang) does not allowin...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check following KBA note and also check the linked blogs in it.

3535726 - Investment Project settlement divided into AUC and Cost Center

You cannot settle the AUC directly but with the cost object such as the investment project/WBS/investment internal order.

Kind Regards,

Lucy

entry.content: Thats the problem. If I pull it to wide it gets printed over the edge if i pull it to small it is to small to scan without a hassel. It only got those two states it does not size to the size I gave the barcode in the designer.

Hello,

How do I do for this ?

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
I have a few ideas I am trying and will let you know the outcome.  Good luck with your tests and lets hope dev can resolve the issue.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: XML Namespace Error with XPATH condition
entry.content: I think you would need to anonymize the XML for your expression to work because it doesn't expect use of a namespace without a prefix.  I tested several variations and none of them work for a namespace without a prefix.

entry.title: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

Welcome to the first episode of my blog! My name is Fabian Caelers, and I've been working with the SAP Fieldglass solution for about six years. I have been implementing Fieldglass projects for our customers in the past 2.5 years in Delivery at SAP and prior to that, in consulting and managing an MSP Program for a customer.

This blog is designed to provide Fieldglass users with valuable tips and tricks for system usage. While some of these tips may be helpful for the typical day-to-day user, the majority will focus on quick-win configuration changes and updates. These changes are sure to have an immediate impact and enhance the solution's functionality. We have noticed that some of our customers struggle to utilize the solution to its full potential and that some enhancements made over the past few years often go unnoticed.

To address this, we are starting this series to encourage you to familiarize yourself with different Fieldglass functionalities and features. Each episode will introduce around three functionalities. To kick things off, I will focus on features from the most recent major release this past November.

Activity Item Checklists

This functionality allows Buyers and Suppliers to group Activity Items into levels within an Activity Checklist. Multiple Activity Items can be completed simultaneously before advancing to the next level. This update ensures that each onboarding step is completed in the proper sequence and that essential tasks, such as training or documentation completion, are fulfilled before granting workers access to sensitive information or systems. For further instructions on how to benefit from this feature, check out the link below:
Activity Item Checklist Levels | SAP Help Portal

Auto-Generate Security ID

This new company sub-configuration allows a Security ID to be automatically generated from a Buyer-defined pattern based on a combination of native SAP Fieldglass fields and required custom fields. Different patterns can be defined for each country/region or for all Security IDs. This new sub-configuration minimizes the risk of incorrect Security ID entry by Buyer and Supplier users, which can negatively impact key features such as Consolidated Worker Records, Potential Matches, and Tenure Policy Management.

Discussions around Security IDs are common in most implementation projects I've been part of, so this is a significant improvement. However, this enhancement is more beneficial for new customers than for existing ones, as it does not consider any entered IDs from historical or recent workers, which may lead to inconsistencies.

  • Security ID Pattern | SAP Help Portal
  • Defining an Auto-generated Security ID Pattern | SAP Help Portal

Allow Clickable Hyperlinks

Though not necessarily a feature that needs to be activated, it’s important to note: When a custom field or chat message contains a hyperlink, the link is now directly clickable within the Fieldglass application. This feature allows customers to store URLs in custom fields across various modules within Fieldglass, linking to other tools used in their processes and enhancing user experience. It works only for Text Area data type custom fields, and if your company has an Allowed URL List, only the listed URLs will work. If not, all URLs will be allowed. This feature is also compatible with data uploads. Importantly, it does not impact existing functionality of Integration uploads with the allow_html_tags_in_value_flag at the custom field level – these will remain unchanged.

Thank you for taking the time to read my blog. Stay tuned for the next episode, and until then, enjoy the holiday season!

entry.title: Re: Display a message from Custom Entity / Query Implemen...
entry.content: Does anyone know if there is a solution in the meantime?

entry.title: 🇪🇸 Service integration with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (Madrid, Spain)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam introduces attendees to service integration with the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP). Specifically, the Node.js flavor of CAP is used.

During this event, you'll become acquainted with how external services can be integrated and consumed from within a CAP project. In working through the exercises you'll also become comfortable with various facilities that CDS offers for declaring, relating and exposing entities, and familiar with how the SAP Cloud SDK covers connectivity and destinations, supporting such integration scenarios with CAP.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Thursday 20 Mar 2025 in Madrid, Spain. It is part of the SIT Madrid 2025 event that is running the day after. Both events will be at the SAP office in Madrid.

You can find more details about the SAP Inside Track Madrid 2025 and registration details here - https://community.sap.com/t5/madrid-events/sap-inside-track-madrid-2025-mar-21-2025/ev-p/13944045

The instructor is Developer Advocate DJ Adams. 

There are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-service-integration-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

If you wish to attend, please indicate that using the "I'm attending" facility on this page. Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 30 attendees for this event. In that context, if you indicate that you're attending and later realise you can't, please remove your name so that others get a chance instead. Thanks!

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: Ahhh now I see. You talk about the option to replace the SAP standard service while generating the SEGW classes. Interesting enough you only see the option if you redefine and then generate. If you generate the service before the option is not shown and even after adding the redefine service is not. Do you know more technical details about the SICF Service Handling URL Routing?

entry.title: Are there any known restrictions when using decentralised EWM with ICSM?
entry.content: Is there a list or does anybody know of any restrictions when using ICSM and EWM - Goods Movement in a decentralised environment, for example are you able to transact using SCWM/ADGI ?

entry.title: Re: Adobe Forms Barcode is printed over Border
entry.content: @Teaman the suggestion I gave is not perfect but you'd have to play with your alignment to get it the best that you can, including possibly manually setting the width (if you are relying on the ticks), or adjusting your display for more tick marks.

entry.title: RAP : To Show Child or not to Show Child, depending on value of field of ROOT
entry.content:
Hello,

depending on the value of a field in my Root table, I have to show another table as a child of my Root.

Can I put some if - then - else or a case structure in metadata extensions??
Or general: " how can you manipulate whether you show a child or not"  in Restful application Programming?

 

thanks a lot!

Helga

entry.title: Re: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in...
entry.content:
Dear Evan,
could you please tell a few words about how you have solved the problem with multiple royalty receivers? We have a similar requirement but for the external commission case, and the standard seems to support only one recipient per sales document.
Thanks and Best Regards
Alexander

entry.title: Re: can we pass blank data from HCI job to Job Relationship portlet
entry.content: Thank u. As suggested we have passed a dummy value and its working as expected.

entry.title: Re: Query Info and BEx Variable selection in SAC Excel Ad...
entry.content:
Found the answer:

⁠SAP.GETVARIABLES() to display BW variables selection and SAP.GETDIMENSIONFILTER() for table filters and ability to change the table filter values. 

There is no function to display query information and last login details though

entry.title: Re: BAPI /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT to Receive HUs for EWM...
entry.content: Thanks Paul for the comment. If you see the documentation of function module /SCWM/MFG_RECEIVE_HUS_EXT, it says "This function module invokes the method RECEIVE_HU of the API "/SCWM/IF_API_MFG_RECEIVING" (check documentation of this method) that enables you to receive packed products from production in handling units.". So this is same.

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: what is "SICF Service Handling URL Routing"

entry.title: Re: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content: @Fabian_Caelers The auto generation of the security ID is such a win!  Thanks for sharing your top items from this release.

entry.title: Re: How to extend the size of an Existing table using ABAP2XLSX
entry.content: abap2xlsx was initially developed to create an XLSX file, then the feature of reading was partially implemented (e.g. reading a table was implemented recently), if I'm not wrong, there's currently no method to delete or change an existing table. But abap2xlsx is an open source project at https://github.com/abap2xlsx/abap2xlsx, pull requests welcome!

entry.title: Hyperscaler / ECS BACKUP SOLUTION / COHESITY
entry.content:
Hello,

according to the SAP_Enterprise_Cloud_Services_Backups.pdf guide, the backup files (full and log) are moved from the source server to the hyperscaler storage in Azure, for example.
How long does the data remain on the source server and at what frequency is the data moved to the hyperscaler storage and transferred to Cohesity?

THX

entry.title: Re: How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA or How to use the OData Service Consumption Mo
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer,

Thank you for creating the utility program! I noticed the custom program for converting the model provider class to be v4 compatible still have some missing replace components like below:

( search_for = |lo_primitive_property->set_edm_type_v2( 'Time' ).|
replace_by = |cast /iwbep/if_v4_med_prim_type_cp( lo_primitive_property )->set_v2_edm_type( 'Time' ).| )

Just wondering, in case in the future we encounter some errors due to some incompatible EDM types, do you know which documentation should we refer to so that we can manually adapt the code from the MPC class?

And also, the generated code from BTP has some extra texts like the ##NO_TEXT. Because of this, the custom utlitiy program is not able to find and replace the corresponding code section. Just a note for future developers who want to use it.

Other than that, so far I managed to make it work for some of the odata v2 services.

entry.title: Re: Extension ledgers in Public cloud
entry.content: Hi Sanne, yes, you are right - the decision about the standard ledgers needs to be taken during the initial scoping activities. You find more information on them, including the related scope items, in the following SAP Help Portal document: "Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs" (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/60e06e02b32c43f0adcc38c540c384d0.html?locale=en-US).

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content: I did some tests and when calling the SAP Standard Service /sap/opu/odata/sap/SD_F2714_SDOCBYOBJSTS_SRV/ the service is handled by the customer extension classes as expected. I want to know where the handling information (use customer class) is injected. Also found following discussion interessting: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/segw-copy-project-vs-redefine-odata-service/qaq-p/10594960

entry.title: Re: Joule is Now Integrated into SAP Build Work Zone!
entry.content:
Hi,

Can BPA process instances be approved/rejected via Joule in SAP BWZN standard edition?

Kind regards,

Enrique Carrero

entry.title: Re: RAP : To Show Child or not to Show Child, depending o...
entry.content: you can bind the visibility of a section(which contains your table) to a attribute, which can be manipulated/determined dynamically.

entry.title: SAP PaPM Cloud Universal Model: What’s New as of 2024-12-12?
entry.content:
Hello, SAP users! 

We’re excited to share the latest updates to the SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM) Universal Model. These new features are designed to make processes smoother, improve decision-making, and boost performance. 

Whether you're a long-time user or just getting started, these updates bring valuable enhancements to help you work smarter and achieve better results. 

If you want to catch up on previous updates, check out our past blog posts using the tag   PaPMCloudUMWhatsNew.  Let’s take a look at what’s new this month! 

Model 

Manage Functions: Introducing the 'Used in Relations' Section 

In Function object page, an additional section called “Used in Relations” is implemented which would automatically be filled by the system if the specific function is used as a Target Model in a relation by other functions. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Manage Connections: Implementing of “Map Existing Fields”  

The button “Map Existing Fields” in Manage Connections has been implemented which will allow users to map the selected connection model fields to already existing fields in the same environment. This button is available in both the Connection object page and Connection Model (Detail) page. 

Map Existing Fields via Connection Object Page 

Map Existing Fields via Connection Model (Detail) Page 

When user presses button “Map Existing Fields”, the message “Fuzzy Mapping Threshold” appears on the screen 

The Fuzzy Mapping Threshold is a configurable parameter designed to enhance the accuracy of automatic field mapping in the system. It determines the level of similarity required for fields to be automatically mapped based on their names, data types, lengths, and decimal precision. This threshold is applied simultaneously to all mentioned attributes to ensure consistent evaluation. 

  • Value Range: The threshold value ranges between 0.00 (least strict) and 1.00 (most strict). 
  • Default Value: The default value is set to 0.50, representing an average level of similarity. 

Impact: 

  • Higher Values (e.g., 0.75): Only fields with very similar names and matching attributes will be considered for mapping. 
  • Lower Values (e.g., 0.25): A broader range of field similarities will be considered, allowing for more flexible mapping. 

The system will evaluate environment fields with matching names, data types, lengths, and decimal precision that are not yet assigned to a connection model field. Fields meeting the defined threshold value are automatically mapped. A higher threshold ensures precise mapping, while a lower threshold provides broader, less strict matches. Users can adjust the threshold value to achieve the desired balance between precision and flexibility. 

Process 

Introduction of Joule in Show Screen of Manage Activities 

Joule which was initially available in Reports, is also now offered in Show Data of Manage Activity, which allows users to create personal chats, enter prompts, and get responses based on the content. 

Another enhancement in Joule is Team Chat Integration wherein users would be able to create a team chat in the Joule pane and members of the specific team related to the activity assigned can participate. 

 

Introduction of Mass Editing of General Information Attributes for Multiple Activities 

On the Manage Activities screen, with the introduction of the new “Edit” button on the tools button section, the user has now the option to edit the General Information of an activity or multiple activities without going into the Activity details screen. 

Initially the Edit button is disabled and only gets enabled when one or more activity/activities is/are selected:

Once the user has already selected an activity, choosing the “Edit” button will launch the edit dialogue box:

Edit Dialogue box is dependent on the View Setting, so it will contain only those fields that have been selected in Settings:

Please note the behavior below when using this functionality. 

  1. If one (1) activity is selected in the list, the edit dialogue box will show the values assigned on the General Information section of the activity. 
  2. If two (2) or more activities are selected in the list, the edit dialogue box will show: 
  1. < Keep Values > - if the header fields selected have different activity description or different values 
  2. Yes – if the header fields selected have the same values (Yes) 
  3. Blank - if the header fields selected have the same values (No) 

 

Changes made from the edit dialogue box in Manage Activities screen are automatically reflected on Activity Details screen.  

 Creating Team Collection with Child Teams in Manage Teams 

In the Manage Teams screen, users can now create a team collection which can contain Child Teams. The created Team Collection can then be assigned to as a Reader Team and Writer Team. 

Since a single Reader Team and Writer Team can be assigned across SAP PaPM UM screens such as an Activity, this feature will be helpful in case users are already assigned to multiple teams and would need to be included as a Reader and/or Writer Team of a specific application artifact. 

To add a Child Team: 

  1. In the Manage Teams screen, select an existing Team from the list. 
  2. Choose Edit button. 
  3. Under Child Teams section, choose Create button. 
  4. Select the Team dropdown, then choose a team. 
  5. Choose Save. 

For more information about Teams, you may check our Application Help for Universal Model: Manage Teams. 

Reports  

Page auto-refresh to stay enabled after page re-fresh 

The Auto-Refresh setting now remains active even after a full page refresh. Users no longer need to manually re-enable Auto-Refresh after refreshing the page, maintaining workflow consistency. 

Show Elements to expand to full browser size 

 Users can now seamlessly enlarge any Show Element to full browser size with a new Expand button. This allows for greater focus on charts and grids, especially when working with side panels.  

  • Expand Button: Located at the top-left of each Show Element, this button maximizes the element to browser size.  
  • Collapse Button: Returns the element to its original position on the page.  

Dynamic Header Hiding for Charts 

To improve focus on charts, we’ve introduced dynamic header hiding:  

  • The header (including buttons) is hidden. 
  • The header appears only when you hover over the chart with your mouse.  

Full Minimization of Charts  

New “Minimize” button was introduced for the user to be able to fully minimize the chart. If the chart is minimized, it appears at the button of the grid on the left side. It can be enlarged or closed.    


Improved Side Panel Accessibilityin Show Elements 

We’ve reworked how side panels for columns, filters, and other settings interact with charts and grids: side panels now expand in front of charts and grids, ensuring quick access.  

Show element and Application element to occupy 100% of editor’s width 

When user inserts a show or application element, it will occupy 100% of the editor's width, making it easier for you to view the required data.

Pop-Up for Comments on Confirm/Reject  in Activity Application element 

Previously, users were prompted to input a custom label when performing Confirm or Reject actions in the embedded Activity application element. With this update, a pop-up for comments now appears, aligning with the behavior already present in the Show Screen and Activity screen.  

The pop-up is triggered whenever a user confirms or rejects an activity.  

Key Behaviors: 

  • Mandatory Comments: If comments are required (based on activity link settings), users must input a comment. Attempting to confirm/reject without a comment will result in a failure to complete the action.  
  • Optional Comments: If comments are not required, the comment field remains optional. A comment will only be saved if the field is not empty.  

Improved Terminology for Process Actions 

We also made a small but meaningful update to the Report Application Element to improve clarity and consistency in process management. The action previously labeled as “Abort” in the Process section of the Report App Element has been renamed to “Terminate.” The term “Terminate” more accurately reflects the intended action of ending a process.  

  • The functionality remains the same; only the label has been updated.  
  • Users can now identify and execute the action more intuitively, reducing potential confusion.  

Joule Team Chat Integration  

Just as in Activity Show Data, Joule Team Chat is also implemented in Reports: team chats can now be created in the Joule pane where members of the specific team assigned to the related report can participate.  

Introduction of “Select/Unselect All” checkbox 

Previously, users had to individually select or unselect columns of report element, which could be cumbersome for datasets with many columns. Now, we’ve added a “Select/Unselect All” checkbox to simplify this process.  

How does it work?  
- Simply check the box to select all available columns or uncheck it to clear all selections instantly.  

We’ve also extended functionality to make column selection more precise when using the Search feature: when a subset of columns is filtered via Search, the Select/Unselect All checkbox applies only to the visible subset. This ensures that your actions affect only the columns you’re working with, avoiding unintended changes to unfiltered columns.  

In normal mode box for group selection is automatically ticked so all columns instantly appear in report element:

In pivot mode box for group selection is automatically unticked so the report element is instantly empty: 

If Search for a subset of columns is done, then the select or unselect is only applied to the subset of columns:

Drill Through Functionality 

“Drill through” feature lets you easily switch between report elements while keeping your filters intact. 

Key Features:

  1. Intuitive Drill Through Menu 
    • Access the new Drillthrough Elements context menu by clicking the designated icon. 
    • This menu dynamically lists all report elements grouped by their respective pages. 
    • Page names are displayed in bold, making navigation simple and clear. 
    • Pages without any elements are automatically hidden from the menu, ensuring a clean and efficient interface. 
  2. Filter Preservation 
    • When you select a new drill through element, all current filter field values are taken over wherever applicable. 
    • This ensures continuity and saves you the effort of reapplying filters, allowing for a smoother analytical flow. 
  3. Highlight Active Elements 
    • The current "broadcasted" element is clearly highlighted in orange, so you always know which element you’re working on. 
  4. Easy Return to Original Data 
    • A Back to Original option in the context menu allows you to quickly return to your starting point, restoring the original dataset and configuration. 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

System 

Manage Chats and Manage Chat Prompts: New Option 

A new option in Manage Chats screen called “DATA” has been made available which allows users to create a chat linked to a specific Activity. 

Once the user goes to Manage Chat Prompts screen, the created chat can be used to communicate with Artificial Intelligence (AI) by creating a prompt. 

You may find out more information about this in our Application Help for Universal Model: Manage Chats and Manage Chat Prompts.  

Administration  

Manage Containers: Export Delta and Full Environment with Ease 

In Manage Containers screen, exporting the recent changes in your environment is already possible by performing “Export Delta” in your existing container. 

In Manage Containers screen, exporting the recent changes in your environment is already possible by performing “Export Delta” in your existing container. 

For more information, see Manage Containers. 

This feature has been extended even more by having an option to export the full environment while exporting the delta at the same time. 

Selecting “Yes” means you will export the environment with its full version in addition to the delta. While Selecting “No” will only export the delta in your environment. 

This feature will give you a convenient way of exporting to update an environment using the delta container. While new content users can start with full container directly at the same time. 

Show Screen 

Enhanced Inline Editing with Sub-item Support  

We’re thrilled to announce significant improvements to the Inline Editing feature, enabling a more efficient and seamless editing experience.  

Inline Editing for Sub-items 

You can now edit not only the main object but also its sub-items directly in Inline Edit Mode.  

Switching to Inline editing for multiple records at once:

Sub-items for editable relations (compositions-to-many) are displayed and editable in the same way as they are on the object page:

Users can perform Create, Delete, and Update operations on sub-items while in Inline Edit Mode:

Upon saving the main object, all changes to sub-items are applied simultaneously and instantly available in object page: 

If errors occur during the save process, they are displayed just like on the object page, ensuring transparency and guidance for corrections:

Records are saved as a whole, including main objects and related sub-items. If any part of a record contains errors, the entire record remains unsaved until corrected.  

Multiple Record Editing

Up to 100 records can be edited in Inline Edit Mode at the same time.  

Multiple selected records can be switched to editable status simultaneously, locking them from edits by other users:

Save All Functionality

A new “Save All” button allows users to save all records in edit mode in one go:

Error Handling for Mass Edits

Records are saved as a whole, including main objects and related subitems. If any part of a record contains errors, the entire record remains unsaved until corrected:

Records with errors are highlighted and unsaved, while correctly edited records are saved:

A summary message at the bottom of the screen provides statistics, indicating how many records were saved, failed, or discarded:

Introduction of “Select/Unselect All” checkbox  

This functionality was introduced not only for the Reports but also for Show Screen.  In Show Screen, it works similarly to the Reports.  The goal also remains the same: to make column selection more intuitive and efficient for users.  

  • To select all available columns - check the “Select All” box. 
  • To clear selection – uncheck it 
  •  When a subset of columns is filtered via Search, the Select/Unselect All checkbox applies only to the visible subset.  

In normal mode box for group selection is automatically ticked so all columns instantly appear on Show Screen:

In pivot mode box for group selection is automatically unticked so Show Screen is initially empty:

If Search for a subset of columns is done, then the select or unselect is only applied to the subset of columns:

 

Stay tuned for the next month developments!  See you on the next blogpost!

entry.title: How to add the filters used on a report to the report output?
entry.content:
I need to make a report that includes the person's name or user id that is running the report, the title of the report and the filters/criteria used to run that report. 

Is this possible? If so, how would I do that?

entry.title: Re: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content: Clickable hyperlinks are such a simple but needed improvement 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
In some line charts I will give different dates such as 2 years (2 years from today, that is, if 2024-11 is selected, I will show between 202411-202211) and 1 year in some other graphs. 

However, I cannot do this because they are all affected by the global filter. When I put a page filter, we can make a setting like “the table with the following name should not be affected by this filter” from the setting in the linked analysis, I want to do it with the global filter

entry.title: What are the best practices for building an SAP BTP app with a backend using CAPM API linked to HANA
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am currently working on a project where I need to build an SAP BTP application with the following architecture:

Backend:
I’m using SAP’s Cloud Application Programming (CAP) model to expose APIs, with the backend logic connected to an HANA database.
Frontend:
The frontend will be built using React, consuming the CAP APIs via HTTP requests.
I’m looking for guidance on the following:

Best practices for developing the backend:

How should I structure my CAP project for performance and maintainability?
What are the optimal configurations for linking CAP to HANA DB in terms of security, scalability, and performance?
Frontend development with React:

What are the best practices for consuming CAP APIs in a React app?
Any suggestions on authentication, error handling, and managing state when working with SAP BTP services and CAP APIs?
Integration considerations:

What are some common challenges when integrating a CAP-based backend with a React frontend, and how can I overcome them?
Deployment and monitoring:

What are the recommended deployment strategies for an SAP BTP application using CAP and React?
How should I monitor the app’s performance, especially the communication between the backend (CAP) and the frontend (React)?
Your insights and experiences are highly appreciated!

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: IAS integration with SAP SuccessFactors Application – 3 (Activation and Testing)
entry.content:
Hi 🙂

I would like to ask you something to see if you can help me.

We are supporting a customer who already has all the upgrades successfully done in all the SF instances before we join the project. Now to implement/activate the IAS for all the instances, the admin customer user created an admin user to myself in IAS console.

Now, I am working in the TEST environment to activate the IAS but something is wrong. I added a rule for the support team login using the MFA (the rule is for our email domain) but when we click in the SF link, we are still login in as before, without "Microsoft screen".

Do you have a clue about this issue?

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Joana Dourado

entry.title: Simplest Way to Restore Resources After a Kyma Cluster Expires on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m using SAP BTP Kyma Runtime, and my cluster will expire soon. I don’t use Persistent Volumes,

my data is only in Kubernetes objects like Deployments, ConfigMaps, and Secrets.

Question:

What is the simplest way to transfer resources from the current Kyma cluster to a new one after the old cluster is gone?

I know Kyma does automatic backups for Kubernetes objects, but:

  1. Can I restore these backups myself?
  2. Is there a simple, SAP-recommended way to migrate resources?
  3. Should I use a tool like Velero to manage backups?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Vendor missing inside PR created through MRP Run
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Our client reported that for a Material, in MD04 they can't see Vendor for a PR. We observed that Vendor isn't available inside PR, hence not shown in MD04. I know this is a well spoken topic, but still i couldn't find solution.

We checked the below,

  1. Valid Source list available with only one Fixed Vendor and Source list Usage - 1 (MRP)
  2. Source list is in valid date range. MRP run & PR creation date is within this range
  3. Vendor info record exists and it isn't blocked or anything
  4. Proc Type - F, No special procurement 
  5. No Scheduling agreement or Quota arrangement exists
  6. Purchase info record exists
  7. Material not deleted in plant or client level

All SAP forums repeatedly tell to check the above which all looks Good here. Not sure if i miss any.

Kindly help me to find the root cause why Vendor not assigned not automatically.

Regards,

Jeffrey

entry.title: Re: Unable to Find SDK Version 24.11 in Mobile Cloud Build?
entry.content:
Releases to Cloud Build will always lag behind the release to the SAP Marketplace.  We don't have a guaranteed timeframe but I would expect 2-3 weeks as a typical timeframe.  

We do make available the SAP Mobile Services Client in the App Store and Play Store that is updated to the latest version and an be used for development testing in many cases as an interim solution.  Alternatively, as you indicated, you can also setup a local build environment to create your own branded clients locally.

There is no workaound within Cloud Build since until it is released there you cannot use that version for builds.  The good news is that we are currently in testing for the MDK 24.11 release to Cloud Build so it is coming soon.

entry.title: Re: POST Survey Response into C4C through OData API
entry.content:
Scenario Overview

In a third-party system, a vendor reaches out to customers to capture their survey responses via phone call. Once these survey results are gathered, the next step is to synchronize this data with SAP C4C for streamlined reporting and analysis. The process involves creating phone calls, linking surveys to those phone calls, capturing survey responses, and marking the survey as complete within SAP C4C.

Key Steps to Implement in SAP C4C

To ensure a smooth data flow from the third-party system into SAP C4C, the following steps should be implemented:

  1. Create a Phone Call in SAP C4C

The first step is to create a phone call entry in SAP C4C, through OData API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/cust/v1/phonecallcollection/ActivityCollection
  • 2.Create a Survey Associated with the Phone Call

Once the phone call is created, the next step is to link a survey to this phone call. The survey will contain all the relevant questions to be answered during the customer interaction. The survey can be created using the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('SurveyObjectID')/SurveyResponse

This API establishes the survey associated with the phone call.

3.Create Survey Response Items

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseCollection('PhonecallObjectId')/SurveyResponseItem
  • 4.Send Survey Question Answers

For each question in the survey, the responses need to be submitted and recorded within SAP C4C. This can be done by sending the question answers via the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    POST https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseItemCollection('PhonecallObjectID')/SurveyQuestionAnswers

This step sends the answers to the corresponding survey questions, completing the customer’s survey participation.

5.Mark the Survey Status as Completed

After all questions are answered, it’s important to update the survey status to “completed.” This ensures that the survey is finalized and ready for reporting and analysis within SAP C4C. The status can be updated using the following API:

  • API Endpoint:
    PATCH https://my3XXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('SurveyObjectID')/SurveyResponse

This API updates the survey status to "completed," signaling the end of the data entry process.

entry.title: SAC Planning - Unable to SAVE
entry.content:
I have a SAC Planning report in Test system, and I am the only one having edit access to it. 

When I go to edit mode, make some changes, and try to save, I get the below error saying 'The story has just been updated by another user. You are now only able to save a copy of the story.'

It might have been locked by my ID itself during any previous session. Anyway I can unlock this? If I donot want to create another copy? In case if there were multiple users who had access to this report, how to identify the user that locked this?

Thank you,

Sarath Sunny

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: IDOC error : Entry in inbound table not found
entry.content:
Taking your example :

iam receiving idoc from XXXHUB to my DEV client200...i want to make clear which parameters(inbound/outbound) i have to maintain in WE20

-- In XXXHUB maintain outbound parameter for logical system (DEV client200).

-- In DEV client200 maintain Inbound parameter for logical system (XXXHUB).

Thanks

Hi,

Can you please confirm if you checked the Auto Sourcing in PIR?

 

Thanks,

Sanan Afridi

entry.title: too many tags
entry.content:
Hello!

Is it possible to hide all these unnecessary tags in the search result overview in SAP for ME?

 

https://me.sap.com/knowledge/search/%7B%22q%22%3A%22sap%22%2C%22tab%22%3A%22All%22%7D

I haven't found any settings for this page.

any hints are welcome.

Thanks

~Enno

How to access the documents please. I am SAP employee.

Thanks,

Bhajan

entry.title: Can we import too new to rate using import overall score
entry.content: Can we import too new to rate using import overall score in PMGM

entry.title: Re: Simplifying HTML5 Content Consumption Across Subaccounts
entry.content:
Hi @rupambhatta,

Thank you for the guide! It was big help in the initial setup. I am consuming now from 1 other subaccount two applications for a central subaccount with a workzone but I have a little problem here. 

While I was able to consume the content with a content provider (it also showed me the provisioned content 1 App 1 Role), I was not able to add the application to a already created Page in my workzone. Well to be more specific I was able to add the application but it is not visible for me when I use the Launchpad itself. I added the Role to Site and added the BTP Role to my user. The only real difference I see with your guide and my implementation is that you used Catalogs and Groups and I used the New Experience. 

Any idea? 

 

BR,

Christoph

entry.title: Re: Users enrolling in courses receive multiple SystemEnrollmentNotifications - 1 for each day of cl
entry.content: We are experiencing the same issue. Really need a solution quickly.

entry.title: No option "Custom application" in Create Extension with SAP Build
entry.content:
I have follow the instruction in Using the Extensibility Wizard | SAP Help Portal

In the demo, there is an option call Custom application

But after in my system, there are only 3 options as below

I want to know how to active the type Custom Application, thank you.

entry.title: SAP ECC to BTP Integration Suite Proxy connection
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have the following situation where sender SAP ECC system would like to send XML proxy message to BTP Integration Suite.. whereas we also have SAP PO in our landscape.. SAP ECC ABAP developer would like to get our SAP PO ESR objects reflected on their SAP ECC system.. But, in runtime the messages should flow via BTP Integration Suite.. How to acheive this , should we ask BASIS guys to create two G type destinations on SAP ECC like mentioned below:

1.  "G" type destination(SAP_PROXY_ESR) to connect to SAP PO ESR. With the help of this destination, ESR objects should be visible in SAP ECC (SPROXY).

2. Another "G" type destination to route the messages to BTP Integration Suite.

Could you please guide me to acheive the above requirement?

Please let me know if something important is missed.

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: Re: Flow function: "Set repeated item value" suddenly not working
entry.content:
I think Dev would have to be certain there was a bug, and they would have to know the difference between what I created and what you created so they can find out what use case does the flow function fail at, if at all. 

Also, I'm not sure you said what landscape you are using.

The only interesting this is that apparently this flow function does not modify the data in the variable, but only in the UI.

entry.title: Re: Strange SELECT behaviour
entry.content: Didn't add FROM A_Purchase_Ledger! Hey Volker what happened to the new 'unofficial' SQL Anywhere site?

entry.title: Re: Is Long term planning is removed from S4 HANA
entry.content: Hello Caetano, do you know where I can find a list of the difference between LTP in ECC and LTP in S/4Hana? There's maybe a note or a KBA?

entry.title: why official document numbering is required in MIRO?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Self-billing has been activated for some vendors /french companies in our system. The process is working according to expectations, using official numbering of invoices, according to french regulation. 

However, when a vendor with active official numbering (LFM2-XERSY populated) is used for a company with ERS EU range populated (T001Z-PAVAL), even if there is no ERS agreement for the vendor within this company, the system generates an error (8A827) during MIRO, requiring us to manage a range for official documents for the vendor/company (in transaction J1AB).

Is this normal ? How can we avoid this ? Especially this is causing issues to business :

  • need to manage unneeded ranges for combinations of vendor/company in J1AB
  • vendor reference set, by business, during MIRO in RBKP-XBLNR, is replaced by official numbering, while the invoice is not an ERS one and vendor reference is lost
  • in the futur, if an ERS agreement is signed for the vendor / plant of the company, ERS invoices will start at an advanced number, confusing the vendor and without be sure about legal validity of this numbering. 

Please advice.

PS: we are in ECC6.

##MIRO; RBKP-XBLNR; ##OfficialNumberin

Thank you in advance

Best regards

Soumeya

entry.title: Re: question on performance issue with AFRU table
entry.content:
Hi Ramya,

can you please tell me how you get to this. Means how we can view diff. tablein which the field exist , how to view this in the system.

entry.title: Re: How to add SAP Datasphere as a datastore in Cloud Int...
entry.content: The datastore is Database, type HANA .

entry.title: tracking external certificates in LMS
entry.content:
I'm trying to track externally completed training certificates in LMS that are attached to learning item so I can run reports with the information and learners can get notifications when they are nearing expiration. In theory I would like the system to generate an expire date based off of the learning item. For example, if they upload a safety certificate that was completed on Jan 1, 2024 the system will automatically log the expire as Jan 1, 2027. 

Am I creating the item incorrectly? Or is this something that is not possible?

entry.title: Link between Subscription parameters amount for recurring fee and usage-based amount to be billed
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

Our customer sells subscriptions as the example below:

Product: ABC
Included service: 200 API calls per truck
Price: 50€ per truck per month + 2€ per additional API call

A pooling principle is applied where:

- if trucks = 2  ==> API calls included = 400
If at the end of the month the total consumption is > 400 -> unit price is applied for as of the 401th API call.

- if trucks = 4 ==> API calls included = 800
If at the end of the month the total consumption is > 800 -> unit price is applied for as of the 801th API call.

As a first thought, I would create a product with a recurring rate element for the monthly fee based on the number of trucks, plus a consumption-based rate element for the additional API calls with a pricing scale ex. truck : 1 -> pricin scale: 0-200ea = 0€ and as of 201ea = 2€ each.

This setup would easily work if the number of trucks would remain always the same, unfortunately this is not the case as the number can both increase and decrease over time.
While the update of the number of trucks is simply solved by updating the number of the subscription parameter (either manually or via API from the external system), updating every time the scale in the lookup table data doesn't seem like a safe/sustainable solution.

Is there a more efficient way to achieve the described scenario? 

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Identity Provisioning not creating users after a read...
entry.content:
Not sure why but I can't mark this as answered, @Dominik-Neumann ominik-Neumann

You are indeed correct, mapping to a work zone only maps roles/apps/etc. where as adding a new target to "Identity Authentication/Provider" creates my users as expected.  An interesting sidenote you can have more than one destination per source which is great.  It's working now, thanks for the assistance!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori Overview Page: 2 lines in 1 chart
entry.content:
Ok, found a solution on my own.

What was missing is the Aggregation in CDS view, that will add the metadata properties automatically.

 

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

Price_Germany,

@Aggregation.default: #SUM

Price_USA

 

Metadata gets:

 

<Property Name="SnapshotDate" Type="Edm.DateTime" Precision="0" sap:display-format="Date" sap:label="Date" sap:quickinfo="Snapshot Date"/>
<Property Name="Price_Germany" Type="Edm.Int32" sap:label="Amount" sap:quickinfo="Info"/>

entry.title: Error - There are currently no scenarios available - flexible worlflow for general journal entries
entry.content:
Hello All,

Getting below error while opening the app  Manage workflow for Journal entry Verification - In General ledger

Error - There are currently no scenarios available 

Context -

  • created a custom scenario in SWDD_SCENARIO by copying the standard one and made required modification.
  • Activated the custom scenario and deactivated the standard one (WS02800046 ) from SPRO->SAP Customizing Implementation Guide>ABAP Platform>Application Server>Business Management>SAP Business Workflow>Flexible workflow>Scenario Activation
  • Now when I open the Manage Workflow for Journal Entry Verification- In General Ledger  -it shows  message - There are currently no scenarios available 

Can you help / guide if any step/config required to make this custom scenario available in Manage Workflows for Journal entry Verification - General Ledger

entry.title: Re: SAP Fieldglass - Quick Win Features
entry.content: Great blog Fabian!  I look forward to more.  Umesh

entry.title: Re: Adding Long Term Backup to existing Contract - What are the options?
entry.content: Dear SAP. Can anyone provide an answer to this question, Thank you.

entry.title: How to filter for Infotype 7 Field status time management in H99_HRFORMS_CALL?
entry.content:
Hi, when using PT61 for creating time statements, employees that do not participate in time management (infotype 0007 field Status time management / zterf subtype 0) are automatically excluded. The problem is PT61 can not create HRFORMS documents but only ABAP Lists. 

We therefore use H99_HRFORMS_CALL for creating time statements based on HRFORMS. The problem here is this program does not automatically exclude employees that do not participate in time management and therefore creates empty pages for those and there is no standard selection option to exclude these employees. Is it possible to create this selection option without programming or is there an easy programming solution?

A workaround would be copying those employee numbers in SE16n and excluding them in H99_HRFORMS_CALL each time we create time statements but this is not ideal.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: Master Data Management: The Foundation for Modern Enterprise Data Architecture
entry.content:
Hello.

There are not data constraints as it applies to the MDM data quality.  If your organization has data constraints on their systems then those could be implemented as data quality business rules to help ensure compliance with your systems.

Second, yes - SAP Master Data Governance is multi-domain.  This one of it's competitive strengths.  There are data domains supported out of the box and the ability to support custom domains as well.

Hope that helps.

Corrie

entry.title: CAP Fiori Application filter query length exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are developing a CAP Fiori application that displays a read-only report. The application retrieves data via an OData V4 service exposed from an ABAP backend.
 
The issue arises when user applies filters in the report. Since the backend metadata contains around 50 columns, the resulting query sometimes exceeds the default HTTP GET request length limit. As a result, the request automatically changes from GET to POST.
 
Although we include the CSRF token in the headers, the backend OData service responds with a "403 CSRF token missing" error when it receives the POST request. It seems the backend expects a CSRF token due to the method change but doesn"t recognize the token being sent.
 
Could you please advise on how to handle this situation or configure the system to avoid such errors?

 

Many Thanks,

Manoj

entry.title: Re: Extending SAPUI5 apps: Adaptation projects vs. Extension projects
entry.content:
Great blog 

So to be clear, Adaptation project will be complete replacement of extension projects?

regards
